mapper.select: SELECT WID.ID, WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID, WID.APPLICATION_ID, WID.APPLICATION_DEPT_ID, WID.APPLICATION_DEPT_NAME, WID.PURCHASE_QUANTITY, WID.MATERIAL_ID, WID.MATERIAL_NAME, WID.SPECIFICATION, WID.SPECIFICATION_DESC, WID.BRAND, WI.BATCH_NO, WI.SUPPLIER_ID, WI.SUPPLIER_NAME, WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY, WID.OUT_QUANTITY, WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY, WID.UNIT, WID.UNIT_CODE, WID.TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, WID.TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, WID.TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, WID.TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, WID.INVOICED_AMOUNT, WID.UNINVOICED_AMOUNT, WID.TAX_AMOUNT, WID.TAX_RATE, WID.MATERIAL_CODE, WID.WARRANTY_EXPIRY_DATE, WID.APPLICATION_DEPT_ID, WID.APPLICATION_DEPT_NAME, WID.PURCHASER_ID, WID.PURCHASER_NAME FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID WHERE WID.ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_IN_ID, APPLICATION_ID, APPLICATION_DEPT_ID, APPLICATION_DEPT_NAME, PURCHASE_QUANTITY, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION, SPECIFICATION_DESC, BRAND, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY, OUT_QUANTITY, REMAINING_QUANTITY, UNIT, UNIT_CODE, TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, INVOICED_AMOUNT, UNINVOICED_AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, TAX_RATE, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_ID, WARRANTY_EXPIRY_DATE, PURCHASER_ID, PURCHASER_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WHERE WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = #{warehouseInId} ORDER BY CREATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL ( ID, WAREHOUSE_IN_ID, APPLICATION_ID, APPLICATION_DEPT_ID, APPLICATION_DEPT_NAME, PURCHASE_QUANTITY, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION, SPECIFICATION_DESC, BRAND, SUPPLIER_ID, SUPPLIER_NAME, WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY, OUT_QUANTITY, REMAINING_QUANTITY, UNIT, UNIT_CODE, TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT, INVOICED_AMOUNT, UNINVOICED_AMOUNT, TAX_AMOUNT, TAX_RATE, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_ID, WARRANTY_EXPIRY_DATE, PURCHASER_ID, PURCHASER_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.warehouseInId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.applicationId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.applicationDeptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.applicationDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.purchaseQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.specification,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.specificationDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.supplierId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.warehouseInQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.outQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.remainingQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taxExcludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.taxIncludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.taxExcludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.taxIncludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.invoicedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.uninvoicedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.taxAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.taxRate,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.warrantyExpiryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.purchaserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.purchaserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} FROM DUAL
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL
APPLICATION_ID = #{applicationId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLICATION_DEPT_ID = #{applicationDeptId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLICATION_DEPT_NAME = #{applicationDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PURCHASE_QUANTITY = #{purchaseQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_NAME = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION = #{specification,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION_DESC = #{specificationDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRAND = #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SUPPLIER_ID = #{supplierId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
SUPPLIER_NAME = #{supplierName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY = #{warehouseInQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
OUT_QUANTITY = #{outQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
REMAINING_QUANTITY = #{remainingQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UNIT = #{unit,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TAX_EXCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE = #{taxExcludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE = #{taxIncludedUnitPrice,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_EXCLUDED_AMOUNT = #{taxExcludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_INCLUDED_AMOUNT = #{taxIncludedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
INVOICED_AMOUNT = #{invoicedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UNINVOICED_AMOUNT = #{uninvoicedAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_CODE = #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
WARRANTY_EXPIRY_DATE = #{warrantyExpiryDate,jdbcType=DATE},
PURCHASER_ID = #{purchaserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
PURCHASER_NAME = #{purchaserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY), 0) FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL AD ON WID.APPLICATION_ID = AD.ID WHERE AD.PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID = #{purchaseDetailId}
AND WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID != #{excludeWarehouseInId}

SELECT AD.PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID AS "purchaseDetailId", PD.PURCHASE_QUANTITY AS "purchaseQuantity" FROM E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL AD INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_PURCHASE_DETAIL PD ON AD.PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID = PD.ID WHERE AD.ID = #{applicationId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL AD ON WID.APPLICATION_ID = AD.ID WHERE AD.PURCHASE_DETAIL_ID = #{purchaseDetailId}

SELECT NVL(SUM(WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY), 0) AS STOCK_QUANTITY FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID WHERE WID.MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId}
AND WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}

SELECT WID.ID, WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID, WID.APPLICATION_ID, WID.MATERIAL_ID, WID.MATERIAL_NAME, WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY, WID.OUT_QUANTITY, WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY, WID.CREATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID WHERE WID.MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId} AND WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId} AND WI.ACCEPTANCE_STATUS = 1 AND WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY > 0 ORDER BY WID.CREATE_TIME ASC

SELECT TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE FROM ( SELECT WID.TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WID.CREATE_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID WHERE WID.MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId} AND WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId} AND WI.ACCEPTANCE_STATUS = 1 AND WID.TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE IS NOT NULL AND WID.TAX_INCLUDED_UNIT_PRICE > 0 ) WHERE RN = 1

SELECT WID.ID, WI.WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, WI.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, WID.MATERIAL_CODE AS materialCode, WID.MATERIAL_NAME AS materialName, CASE WHEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c3.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL AND c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c2.CATEGORY_NAME || '/' || c.CATEGORY_NAME WHEN c.CATEGORY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN c.CATEGORY_NAME ELSE '' END AS categoryName, WID.SPECIFICATION AS specification, WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY AS availableStock, WID.BRAND AS brand, WID.UNIT AS unit FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_APPLICATION_DETAIL AD ON WID.APPLICATION_ID = AD.ID LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CODE MC ON WID.MATERIAL_ID = MC.ID AND MC.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c ON MC.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID AND c.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c2 ON c.PARENT_ID = c2.ID AND c2.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN E_MATERIAL_CATEGORY c3 ON c2.PARENT_ID = c3.ID AND c3.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY > 0 AND ( AD.EQUIP_IDS IS NOT NULL AND ( AD.EQUIP_IDS = #{equipId} OR INSTR(',' || AD.EQUIP_IDS || ',', ',' || #{equipId} || ',') > 0 ) )
AND WID.MATERIAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{materialName} || '%'
AND WI.WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{warehouseName} || '%'
ORDER BY WID.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT WID.ID, WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID, WID.APPLICATION_ID, WID.MATERIAL_ID, WID.MATERIAL_NAME, WID.SPECIFICATION AS specificationModel, WID.UNIT AS unitName, WID.UNIT_CODE AS unitCode, WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_QUANTITY, WID.OUT_QUANTITY, WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY AS bookQuantity, WID.CREATE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN_DETAIL WID INNER JOIN E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE_IN WI ON WID.WAREHOUSE_IN_ID = WI.ID WHERE WI.WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId} AND WI.ACCEPTANCE_STATUS = 1 AND WID.REMAINING_QUANTITY > 0 ORDER BY WID.CREATE_TIME ASC
